title: ASR Outdoor Queen Size 60x80 Southwest Wilderness Adventure Fleece Throw Blanket
description:
Wherever your plans may take you, our soft fleece throw blanket is the perfect fleece throw blanket to keep you warm indoors or outdoors Incredibly soft, warm and cozy, these plush throw blankets from ASR Outdoor have a design that boast traditional southwestern flair with a nod to classic and timeless Navajo and Aztec inspired design. The fleece blankets are ultra soft, as well as insulating, making them a great item to include with your hiking or camping gear, but also entirely suitable for movie marathon nights in, as a beach or picnic blanket or for an evening of summer stargazing

ASR Outdoor Queen Size 60x80 Southwest Wilderness Adventure Fleece Throw Blanket

Wherever your plans may take you, our soft fleece throw blanket is the perfect fleece throw blanket to keep you warm indoors or outdoors

Key Features

  • SOUTHWEST NAVAJO BLANKET: With a nod to classic Navajo and Aztec design, these fleece blankets are durable, lightweight, easy to take care of and amazingly soft! The throw blankets are versatile for camping, road trips, summer picnic or an evening next to the campfire
  • ULTRA SOFT FLEECE BLANKET: Incredibly soft, you’ll want to have one nearby at all times; Use for bedding, camping or an all night movie marathon; lightweight, breathable plush fleece keeps in heat, making the blankets perfect for lounging or as another layer in your sleeping bag
  • SUMMER AND WINTER BLANKET: Created as a lightweight alternative to wool, these fleece throw blankets are breathable and can retain an incredible amount of heat; indoors or out, these fleece blankets will not only feel soft on your skin but will to keep you warm
  • COTTAGE AND CABIN DECOR: Grab a book and a hot cup of coffee or tea and snuggle up with these perfect cottage or cabin decor throw blankets; wonderfully soft to the touch, these throw blankets are perfect for a quiet night in or evening under the stars
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Size: Queen, 60 x 80 inches; Weight: 2.05lbs; Material: Ultra Plush Fleece; Care: Machine Wash Cold, hang dry or tumble dry low

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROSWNFTB
  • UPC: 855569007584
  • Size: Queen

Incredibly soft, warm and cozy, these plush throw blankets from ASR Outdoor have a design that boast traditional southwestern flair with a nod to classic and timeless Navajo and Aztec inspired design. The fleece blankets are ultra soft, as well as insulating, making them a great item to include with your hiking or camping gear, but also entirely suitable for movie marathon nights in, as a beach or picnic blanket or for an evening of summer stargazing.

The fleece material is synthetic, and, shares many of the same qualities as wool, predominantly its excellent ability to retain heat; but these blankets are extra plush, so soft to the touch and semi permeable, meaning they are breathable and help to regulate temperature but, still keep the heat that our bodies generate under the blanket, making them great for camping, travel, road trips and much more. Our large fleece throw blankets are bound together with a flat black knit trim edge, for a clean finish that will help to prolong the throw blankets structural longevity.

Looking for a perfect gift? Look no further and give the gift of warmth. Available in multiple colorways, our fleece throw blankets are perfect for everyone on your holiday shopping list from bookworm and avid outdoorsman, to upcountry weekend cabin or cottage goers, kids and even pets, sure to keep everyone warm for many seasons to come!
